Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class CustomApplication

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.CustomApplication
public class CustomApplication extends Metadata

Java class for CustomApplication complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CustomApplication">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="actionOverrides" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AppActionOverride" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="brand" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AppBrand" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="consoleConfig" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ServiceCloudConsoleConfig" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultLandingTab" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="formFactors" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FormFactor" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isNavAutoTempTabsDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isNavPersonalizationDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isNavTabPersistenceDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isServiceCloudConsole" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="logo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="navType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NavType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="preferences" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AppPreferences" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="profileActionOverrides" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AppProfileActionOverride" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="setupExperience" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="subscriberTabs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="tabs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="uiType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}UiType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="utilityBar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="workspaceConfig" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AppWorkspaceConfig" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getActionOverrides

      public List<AppActionOverride> getActionOverrides()
      Gets the value of the actionOverrides property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the actionOverrides property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getActionOverrides().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list AppActionOverride

      Returns:
      The value of the actionOverrides property.

    • getBrand

      public AppBrand getBrand()
      Gets the value of the brand property.
      Returns:
      possible object is AppBrand

    • setBrand

      public void setBrand(AppBrand value)
      Sets the value of the brand property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is AppBrand

      Sets the value of the consoleConfig property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is ServiceCloudConsoleConfig

    • getFormFactors

      public List<FormFactor> getFormFactors()
      Gets the value of the formFactors property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the formFactors property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFormFactors().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FormFactor

      Returns:
      The value of the formFactors property.

    • getProfileActionOverrides

      public List<AppProfileActionOverride> getProfileActionOverrides()
      Gets the value of the profileActionOverrides property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the profileActionOverrides property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getProfileActionOverrides().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list AppProfileActionOverride

      Returns:
      The value of the profileActionOverrides property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the subscriberTabs property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getSubscriberTabs().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the subscriberTabs property.

      public List<String> getTabs()
      Gets the value of the tabs property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the tabs property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getTabs().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the tabs property.
